title: ceo-orchestration benchmark manifest
description: Schema for benchmark replay manifests consumed by .claude/scripts/swarm/_benchmark_replay.py (PLAN-017 P06 scaffold + PLAN-051 Phase 5 pre-registration). Locked by ADR-071 + docs/benchmarks/sprint-32-fairness-protocol.md §3-4.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this manifest; bump requires new ADR.

fairness_protocol_ref.description: Git-tracked path to the pre-registration protocol this run adheres to. Freshness verified at run start.

competitor_context.description: Public baseline scores being compared against; NEVER a live API reference.

vendors.description: List of vendors/systems whose public scores are referenced for comparison.

score_source_url.description: Public URL of the leaderboard or paper where the score was sourced.

score_snapshot_date.description: ISO date of the score snapshot; staleness tracked per fairness protocol §3.7.

reported_score_pct.description: Published score as a percentage (0-100) of issues resolved.

benchmark_version.description: Upstream benchmark version/edition the score was reported against.

tasks.description: Pre-registered task list. Per fairness protocol §7, selection happens BEFORE any run and is immutable for that run.

task_id.description: SWE-bench-lite issue id (e.g. 'django__django-12345') or equivalent identifier.

seed.description: Deterministic seed for framework random exploration. Fixed per task.

timeout_seconds.description: Hard ceiling for task wall-clock. Task exceeding this counts as FAIL.

expected_score_range.description: [min, max] — if actual score outside this range, flag for investigation. NOT a pass/fail gate.

sandbox.description: Ephemeral Docker sandbox constraints. Per fairness protocol §4 + Security P1.

container_image_digest.description: Docker image reference pinned by digest (NEVER by tag). Example: 'swebench/sweb.eval:latest@sha256:...'.

network_mode.description: 'none' = --network=none (default, preferred). 'host-allowlist' = network access gated by allowlisted hosts (Claude API only, per allowed_endpoints).

allowed_endpoints.description: Only consulted when network_mode=host-allowlist. Must include protocol + host + optional port; e.g. 'https://api.anthropic.com:443'.

mount_mode.description: Source repo mount mode. Default readonly per Security Risk #3.

workspace_tmpfs_mb.description: tmpfs size for /workspace in the container.

measurement.description: Measurement methodology per fairness protocol §3. Defaults enforce the protocol; override at own risk.

statistics_required.description: Required percentiles; per §3.2, NEVER mean alone.

cold_warm_separation.description: Cold run (first per task) reported separately from warm runs.

latency_decomposition.description: Preserve work_latency_ms vs git_overhead_ms split per C4 SLA.

independent_verifier.description: Pre-publish independent-verifier step per fairness protocol §5.

required.description: Per ADR-071, MUST be true for any published results.

verifier_agent_type.description: Which agent acts as independent verifier. Must be a different spawn from the original runner.

tolerance_p95_pct.description: Verifier p95 divergence tolerance. Default ±5% per fairness protocol §5.

sample_tasks_for_verification.description: How many tasks the verifier re-runs. Default 1 (minimum; enough to detect gross divergence).

sample_seeds_per_verifier_task.description: Seeds per verifier-sampled task. Default 3 per fairness protocol §5.

budget.description: Cost and runtime budgets; breach closes Phase 5 via refused-ADR per fairness protocol §6.

max_total_usd.description: Hard ceiling on Claude API spend. Fairness protocol §6 refuses at $1000.

max_total_wall_clock_hours.description: Upper bound on total wall-clock hours across all tasks/runs. Exceeding this closes Phase 5 via refused-ADR per fairness protocol §6.
